// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers services. Services with tags are only registered when matching tags are passed.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="services">The service collection.</param>
        /// <param name="tags">Optional tags to filter which services to register.</param>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, params global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> tags)
        {
            if (!tags.Any())
            {
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Logger, global::TestNamespace.Logger>();
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.ILogger>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Logger>());
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.MyService, global::TestNamespace.MyService>();
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.MyService>());
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Consumer, global::TestNamespace.Consumer>();

                // Func wrapper registrations
                services.AddScoped<global::System.Func<string, global::TestNamespace.IService>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
                    new global::System.Func<string, global::TestNamespace.IService>((string arg0) =>
                    {
                        var p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.ILogger>();
                        var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.MyService(arg0, p0);
                        return s0;
                    }));
            }

            return services;
        }
    }
}
